# Paul K. Lunow
> CTO, published author, podcast host, and tech mentor based in Germany.

## About
Paul K. Lunow has 20 years of experience in the tech industry, working in nearly every conceivable role. He is currently CTO at Vention Solutions GmbH, supporting companies in implementing successful technology projects.

## Book — Riaru (2025)
Riaru is Paul K. Lunow's debut novel, a cyber fiction thriller published by Periplaneta on January 15, 2025. 244 pages, written in German.
Riaru is also available as an audiobook (Lauscher Lounge, January 30, 2026), narrated by Rebecca Veil. ISBN: 978-3-911421-17-1, duration: 8h 19m.
Audiobook: https://www.lauscherlounge.de/produktionen/riaru

## Podcast — Product & Cake
Co-hosted podcast about tech products and leadership. Available on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, and Podcastle.
RSS: https://podcast-feed.paul-lunow.de/

## Services
- CTO consulting and technology strategy
- Startup mentoring (sparring partner, coaching)
- Advisory board participation
- Mentor at Tech4Germany

## Contact
Email: hallo26@paul.lun.io
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/paul-lunow
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/paullunow/
